title: Timeline
description: A shared advancement timeline with a custom calendar and Hall of Fame
body:
!["Concept" text banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_291a8610-3755-47bc-899e-0bd56646a9df.png) Minecraft advancements. Super fun, I know. This mod tries to give you a more tangible sense of accomplishment, by capturing all advancements from players on the server and displaying them on a Timeline with some extra "pezazz". *jazz hands*👋👋 It should be easy for server admins to add custom advancements and how they affect the Timeline's visuals, as well as adding custom events called "Notes" for everyone to read. The **Timeline** mod aims to enhance roleplaying by adding a calendar system. A simple "day counter" is too ubiquitous for players to immerse themselves in the adventure and story that unfolds
[![Support me on Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-SUPPORT-FF5E5B?logo=ko-fi&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://ko-fi.com/z2six) [![Join our Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-JOIN-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/EF6Wvkt7AK)
!["Features" text banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_61fea4e2-116a-407d-ba3b-38bf40f4c559.png) ### Date system - Completely configurable date system that shows a daily toast to players with the current day. For example: *"Day 1 of Shadowmere, 420 After Notch"* ![Showing the "Date system" toast](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_fcaab6e0-21d8-4f85-9685-756b101af6c8.png)
### Chronicle - All advancements (including ones from mods and ones you add yourself) are recorded into the "Chronicle". You'll see a timeline with "nodes" on them, showing what people have accomplished around that time. ![Showing the main feature, the "Timeline"](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1454051/description_4f9ae7a1-8ae9-445b-9907-436e5f551129.png)
### Hall of Fame - Keeps track of how many Advancements people have accomplished, including whether they were "world-first". It's about time you are acknowledged for your accolades! ![Showing the "Hall of Fame" feature](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1454051/description_046e7481-087e-4e98-ac23-654350fe4b90.png)
### Highly configurable - Everything you see can be configured: how many months, names of each month, what is shown on the timeline.. You name it! And, all configuration is hotloaded. Meaning, whatever you change immediately goes into effect for all players.
### Localization - **Timeline** covers an extensive range of other languages: 27, to be exact! And I'm always willing to add more. Just reach out to me on Discord or via the comments and I'll get to it.
!["Compatibility" text banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_c2fc2a00-f511-490d-810b-c15a80cbb92f.png) **Timeline** adds compatibility with several mods to further enhance its features. Got an idea for additional compatibilities? I'd love to hear it.
### Serene Seasons (by TheAdubbz) [Serene Seasons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/serene-seasons) ![Serene Seasons compatibility "Spring"](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_8c66ab40-dfd4-4169-8dcc-3da7ef548e1b.gif) ![Serene Seasons compatibility "Summer"](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_a4120c62-dbd5-42e4-908d-a0241ae2b0dc.gif) ![Serene Seasons compatibility "Fall"](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_797343ed-6230-40d9-b991-f0c3021f630e.gif) ![Serene Seasons compatibility "Winter"](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_7406a743-6eab-44a5-89c1-d0e2e7dd7553.gif)
### Tooltip Overhaul (by xylonity) [Tooltip Overhaul](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tooltip-overhaul) ![Showing compatibility with "TooltipOverhaul"](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_c8a9e1c3-09d3-40e5-9aeb-82bd855357b1.gif)
### Legendary Tooltips (by Grend_G) [Legendary Tooltips](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/legendary-tooltips) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_15369d78-1aa7-4a29-9736-82bfb8fd3759.png)
!["FAQ" text banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_90b42683-9725-4d72-b141-9c98b8beeef4.png) - **My question is not listed here!** - Please first read the wiki, your answer may be there. If not, chat with me on Discord. - **Fabric?** - Hmm.. No, probably not. I may in the future. Spam me enough and I may consider. 😝 - **Port to version X?** - I only intend on maintaining Forge 1.20.1, NeoForge 1.21.1 as well as the new 1.22.x
!["License" text banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_3ff3e203-9d93-42c6-95dc-c60a7d5b7e33.png) Custom License: [Z2SIX Mod License (Assets + Code)](https://github.com/z2six/RPG_Calendar/blob/1.21.1/LICENSE.md) https://github.com/z2six/RPG_Calendar/blob/1.21.1/LICENSE.md
Assets excluded from license: 1. Font is "Jacquard 12" by Sarah Cadigan-Fried and is permissable under its own license as found on Google Fonts as per 04 February 2026. (link: https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Jacquard+12/license) 2. Icons used for the "Seasonal" textures in the Timeline (acorn.png, flower_stage_1.png, flower_stage_2.png, flower_stage_3.png, flower_stage_4.png, ice.png, ice2.png, ice3.png, leaf.png) are courtesy of Glionox.
